title: Utkal University Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Utkal University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate (RA) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

basic_details.job_title: Utkal University Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Utkal University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate (RA) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Chemistry, Chemical Sciences, or Materials Science
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Chemistry, Chemical Sciences, or Materials Science

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Utkal University Research Associate (RA) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Utkal University Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Utkal University Research Associate (RA) position is 06-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Chemistry, Chemical Sciences, or Materials Science to be eligible for the Research Associate (RA) position at Utkal University.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate (RA) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate (RA) post is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for specific categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate (RA) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate (RA) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Utkal University Research Associate (RA) recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for this recruitment must be submitted via email. You need to send your complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Utkal University Research Associate (RA) recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Associate (RA) post?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Research Associate (RA) position will be based on an Interview/Interaction process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Research Associate (RA) position at Utkal University is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is Utkal University located?
faq.answer: Utkal University is located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha, with the pincode 751004.

faq.question: Q10. Does the notification mention any age relaxation?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for candidates belonging to scheduled castes/tribes/OBC, women, and physically handicapped candidates.
